name: lpnf-corridor-to-coast
description: Hot, dry, windy day on the lpnf-south baseline. Single ignition in the NE interior GRASSLAND mass. Prevailing 45-degree wind drives fire SW through continuous fuel toward the Carpinteria-side urban interface (rows 38-40, cols 3-11). Validation target for the fire-aware sampler. See companion lpnf-corridor-to-coast.md for hypothesis, stakes, and expected observations.
